top_errors.message: BeamRemnants::setKinematics: kinematics construction failed after retrying 10 times

top_warnings.message: Pythia::check: not quite matched particle energy/momentum/mass
StringFragmentation::fragmentToJunction: bad convergence junction rest frame

next_steps: Review BeamRemnants and fragmentation error logs to isolate phase-space regions causing retries.
Test alternative soft-QCD/PYTHIA tune or adjust MPI/space-shower parameters to reduce weight>1 occurrences.
Rerun short jobs with neighboring seeds to see if failures persist or are seed-specific.
risks: BeamRemnants::setKinematics repeatedly failed, indicating problematic remnant handling for soft-QCD setup.
StringFragmentation join/junction warnings risk biasing hadronization and multiplicity observables.
Space-shower weight>1 and momentum mismatch warnings suggest shower tuning may be inconsistent with MPI settings.
llm_run_summary.tldr: Run produced 20k/20k events but frequent BeamRemnants, hadronLevel, and string fragmentation failures show unstable soft-QCD modeling.

suggestions: Inspect top error categories in diagnostics before trusting physics conclusions.
Review warning categories; repeated shower or hadronization warnings can bias tails.
Compare at least two nearby seeds to confirm stability of key yields.
teammate_summary.tldr: Minimum-bias / underlying-event QCD study: attempted 20000 events, accepted 20000, failed 0. Viability assessment: caution.
